options.name: --space-id
options.description: Space ID to use for space-scoped backend token

options.name: --reset
options.description: Reset the Ikon tool by clearing all user data

options.name: --disable-auto-login
options.description: Disable auto login to the Ikon backend

options.name: --disable-auto-update
options.description: Disable automatic update checks (setting CI=true env var will also disable auto updates)

options.name: --all-keys
options.description:
Request all API keys from the backend (admin only)
Authentication
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
login [target]                                     Login to the Ikon backend
logout                                             Logout from the Ikon backend
Configuration
config                                             Select the active organisation and space
General
examples [action]                                  Open or download Ikon example projects
status                                             Show the current login status and backend environment
update                                             Update the Ikon tool to the latest version
version                                            Print the current version of the Ikon tool
Commands (use 'ikon <command>' for details)
install ...                                        Installation commands (3 commands)
tool ...                                           Tool management commands (3 commands)
